Studio management - ceramics community across Europe

One platform for
ceramic studios
and the people
who love clay.

Run your studio without the chaos - stay connected with members, other studios, and ceramicists across Europe in one calm place.

Join community What is free

Free to join - no credit card required.

What is Aruru

A place where ceramicists find each other, share knowledge, and grow together.

Whether you have been throwing for twenty years or just discovered the wheel last month - Aruru is a calm place to belong. No algorithms deciding what you see. No pressure to perform. Just ceramicists, clay, and honest conversations.

🌍

Find your community

Discover studios, artists, and events near you. See who is working in your city, follow ceramicists you admire, and find the studio that fits how you work.

💬

Share what you know

The forum is organised by topic - technique, kiln, glazing, business. Ask a question, share a discovery, start a conversation. No judgement, no noise.

📚

Knowledge in one place

Stop jumping between tabs and YouTube channels. Members share links, recommendations, and resources directly in the community - books, videos, techniques, suppliers.

📅

Events and workshops

Studios and artists publish workshops, exhibitions, open studios, symposia, and residencies in one shared feed. Find what is happening near you - or anywhere.

🏺

Your artist profile travels with you

One account connects you to every studio on Aruru. Change studios, move cities, work independently - your community stays with you.

"No algorithms. No engagement bait. Just ceramicists finding each other - because good work deserves a real community."

Always free for ceramicists

  • Artist profile and studio connections
  • Community forum - read and post
  • Event feed - studios and personal events
  • Studio directory - find studios near you
  • Book studio time
  • Sign up for workshops and events
  • Sponsor directory - find materials by country

Common questions

No. You can join Aruru as an independent ceramicist, without belonging to any studio. Create your artist profile, join the forum, and discover events near you - all for free.

Yes. The community features - forum, events, artist profiles, studio directory, booking studio time - are free for ceramicists. Always. Studio management tools (kiln costs, billing, tasks, materials) require a studio subscription, but that is paid by the studio owner, not by you as a member.

The forum is organised by topic: technique, kiln, clay and glazes, business, and general. Ask questions, share what you have learned, recommend a book or a YouTube channel, start a conversation about something you are working on. It is a slow, honest space - not a social feed.

Yes. Any ceramicist can publish a personal event - a workshop you are running, an exhibition, an open studio - and it appears in the shared community feed under your name. You do not need to be a studio owner.

Who is Aruru for?

Built for everyone who works with clay.

Whether you run a studio, work in one, or simply love ceramics - Aruru has a place for you.

Ceramicist · Member

Find your people. Stay connected to your craft.

Whether you work in one studio or many - Aruru keeps you connected to the ceramics community. Free to join, no subscription needed.

🌍
Community feed and forum - discover workshops, open studios, and exhibitions. Share techniques and ask questions with ceramicists near you
🏺
One profile, many studios - your artist profile and community connections travel with you across studios
📅
Share your own events - publish your workshops and exhibitions in the community feed - under your name
📋
Studio tools when you need them - book studio time free. When your studio subscribes, also see kiln costs, buy materials, and more
Join community →

Studio owner · Assistant

Run your studio. Grow your community.

Aruru handles the admin so you can focus on clay. Kiln costs, member billing, tasks and events - all in one calm place. Your studio is visible to ceramicists from day one.

🔥
Kiln and cost management - open sessions, log pieces by weight, split costs automatically per member
💶
Billing and data export - per-member cost summaries and full Excel export. Your data stays yours
✓
Team and tasks - assign work, set priorities, track hours. Owner, assistant and member roles
🌍
Studio directory and events - your studio appears in the community directory. Publish events to the shared feed - free
Start your studio →

Clay supplier · Brand · Partner

Reach ceramicists where they make real decisions.

Aruru is a focused community of studios and serious ceramicists. Your brand appears where they look for materials, tools, retreats, and inspiration.

🛒
Partner profile and direct link - ceramicists discover your products and go straight to your store in one tap
📰
Partner updates and forum posts - share new products, promotions, and news. Always clearly marked
📊
Real reach stats - see clicks and profile views each month
🌍
Country filter - reach studios and artists in the countries you ship to
Apply as a partner →

For partners and sponsors

Support our growing community - and grow with it.

Aruru stays calm and ad-free for ceramicists because the product is built around trust, not algorithms. Partnering with us means your name shows up where people already make real decisions - what clay to buy, which glaze to try, and which room they want to work in next.

That same space welcomes pottery retreats, residencies, and galleries looking for artists - not as noise, but as peers beside the studios and teachers our members already respect.

🛒

Direct shop link

Ceramicists go straight to your store in one tap - no generic marketplace, no distractions.

📰

Partner updates

Dedicated section for new products, launches, and seasonal offers. Clearly marked - honest, not hidden.

💬

Forum presence

Post in the community forum. Reach ceramicists where they already talk about materials and technique.

🌍

Country filter

Your profile is visible to ceramicists in the countries you ship to. Reach the studios you actually serve.

📊

Real stats

See clicks and profile views each month. Real numbers, no guessing.

✓

Honest placement

Partners cannot read community messages or target members. Every partner post is clearly marked.

Partner plans

Basic

€15/month

1 partner update per month

Dedicated section - new products, promotions, news

1 post in community forum per month

Partner profile in directory

Logo on your updates

Logo in aruru.xyz footer

Country filter

Stats - clicks and profile views

Standard

€29/month

2 partner updates per month

Dedicated section - new products, promotions, news

2 posts in community forum per month

Partner profile in directory

Logo on your updates

Logo in aruru.xyz footer

Country filter

Stats - clicks and profile views

Apply as a partner →

Partner questions

No. Partners cannot read or access community messages, forum posts, or any conversations between members. Their presence on the platform is limited to their own profile and their own posts.
Clay suppliers, glaze brands, tool makers, pottery retreats, residency programmes, and galleries looking to connect with artists. Every application is reviewed manually. We only approve partners that are genuinely relevant to ceramicists.
A partner update appears in a dedicated sponsors section - new products, promotions, seasonal offers. A forum post is a regular post in the community forum, clearly marked as coming from a partner. Both are included in each plan.
1

Register and get approved

Apply with your organisation details. We review every partner to keep the directory relevant to ceramicists.

2

Set up your profile and main link

Add your logo, description, and a direct link - shop, booking page, open call, or portfolio.

3

Post partner updates and forum posts

Share new products, seasonal offers, or news. Always clearly marked - honest, not hidden.

4

Track your reach

See how many ceramicists visited your profile and clicked through to your store each month.

For studio owners

Calm tools for running a ceramic studio.

Community features are always free. Studio management tools - kiln costs, billing, tasks, materials - unlock with a plan. You decide what members see.

Always free for every studio: studio profile in the directory, event publishing, member invites, booking studio time, community forum access for all members. No subscription needed to build your community.

🔥

Kiln management

Open sessions, log pieces by weight. Costs split automatically per member at close.

  • Bisque and glaze firings
  • External guest rates
  • Damage reports
  • Leave open for unloading
💶

Costs and billing

Per-member cost summaries with full breakdown. Export to Excel. No extra billing tools needed.

  • Kiln, open studio, events
  • Materials and misc charges
  • Monthly reports per member
  • Cost report after firing
✓

Tasks and team

Assign work, set priorities, track hours. Owner, assistant and member roles keep control where it belongs.

  • Task assignment and priorities
  • Hour logging per member
  • Assistant and member roles
📦

Materials catalogue

List materials members can buy directly through the app. Costs tracked automatically.

  • Clay, glazes, tools
  • Purchase history per member
  • Visible in member dashboard
🏺

Private kiln

Define private kiln types with name, description and price. Members request - you approve.

  • Multiple kiln types
  • Approval flow
  • Charge added automatically
📊

Attendance

Track assistant attendance and studio presence. See who is in the studio today.

  • Check-in and check-out
  • History per assistant

As a studio owner you decide which tools and sections members see on their dashboard. Start simple - add more when you are ready. You can change this at any time.

📅

Events

Members see upcoming studio events and can sign up directly in the app.

📅

Bookings

Members can book studio time and see how many members have booked today.

🔥

Kilns

Members see their kiln firing history and cost breakdown per session.

💶

Costs and billing

Members see their monthly cost summary. No live costs - only end-of-month totals.

📦

Materials

Members can browse and buy from your studio materials catalogue.

🏺

Private kilns

Members can request a private kiln session. You approve or reject each request.

Solo

€15/month

Up to 20 members

Kiln firings and cost splits

Tasks and hour logging

Costs and billing

Data export (Excel)

Studio

Up to 50 members

Everything in Solo

Assistant roles

Unlimited members

Priority support

Partner visibility boost

14-day free trial · No credit card required · Cancel anytime · All plans include community features

Start free trial

Plan questions

After 14 days you choose a plan and enter payment details, or continue with the free community features. Your studio data stays intact either way.

Yes. You can upgrade or downgrade at any time from within the app. Changes take effect at the next billing cycle.

No. The subscription is paid by the studio owner. Members use Aruru for free - community features always, studio tools when the studio subscribes.

Security and privacy

Your studio data stays your studio data.

Multi-tenant architecture with strict per-studio isolation. Your data never touches another studio's data - by design, not policy.

EU hosting · Frankfurt Bcrypt passwords HTTPS everywhere 2FA · TOTP and email GDPR compliant No ads · No tracking Rate-limited auth Data export and deletion

All data is stored in MongoDB Atlas in Frankfurt, Germany (eu-central-1). The backend runs on Railway in the EU region. Nothing is stored outside Europe.

Yes. Studio owners can export all studio data as Excel from within the app. Any user can download their personal data or delete their account from Profile settings. Data is retained for 90 days before permanent removal, in line with GDPR Articles 15-22.

No. Partners cannot read community messages, forum posts, or any member data. They see only their own profile and posts. Aruru does not sell or share user data with any third party.

Yes. All data is hosted in the EU. Users have the right to access, correct, export, and delete their data at any time. No personal data is used for advertising. Full privacy policy available at aruru.xyz/privacy.

Database location

MongoDB Atlas · Frankfurt, Germany (eu-central-1)

Data isolation

Strict tenant scoping on every query - studio A cannot see studio B

Authentication

JWT · 30-day TTL · Optional 2FA (TOTP or email code)

Your rights

Download your data · Delete your account · GDPR Art. 15-22

Advertising

No ads · No tracking pixels · No data sold to third parties

Sponsor access

Partners cannot read messages, forum posts, or any member data

Ready to start?

Join studios and ceramicists - stay organised, connected, and inspired. Community features are free - add studio tools when you are ready.
